scores.correctness_notes: Core K8s structure is correct (containers, resources with oci-image, assumes k8s-api), but uses the older 'bases:' syntax with build-on/run-on instead of the current 'base: ubuntu@24.04' + 'platforms: amd64:' syntax shown in the gold standard. Summary length limit stated as 'under 100 chars' but gold standard says max 78 chars.
scores.hallucination_notes: No fully invented APIs. Minor inaccuracy: summary described as 'under 100 chars' when the actual limit is 78 chars. The 'bases:' build-on/run-on structure is real but outdated syntax, not hallucinated.
